health.note: Engineering health — the efficiency/oversight loop: measure · profile · standardise · automate · modularise · document. GENERATED at build time where deterministic (profile sizes, parser gaps, version, doc-sync); LAST-KNOWN where captured from the most recent green release-gate run (total tests, timings, bundle).
